resume.summary: Experienced software engineer with expertise in full-stack development and a passion for building scalable applications.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Led development of microservices architecture serving 1M+ users
Improved application performance by 40% through optimization
Mentored junior developers and conducted code reviews

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express
Collaborated with product team to define requirements

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

paragraphs: I am writing to express my strong interest in the Software Engineer position at your company. With my background in developing robust web applications and leading cross-functional teams, I am confident in my ability to contribute to your engineering organization.

In my current role, I have successfully led the development of microservices architecture that serves over 1 million users. I have a proven track record of delivering high-quality code while mentoring junior developers and fostering a collaborative team environment.

I am particularly drawn to this opportunity because of your company's focus on innovation and engineering excellence. I believe my experience in cloud-native development and my passion for solving complex technical challenges make me an ideal candidate for this role.
coverLetter.closing: Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my skills and experience align with your needs.

notes: Emphasized cloud-native experience and team leadership.
